flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Millersville University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.0k → $15.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Millersville University of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (54.4% vs 63.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Millersville University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Millersville University of Pennsylvania rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (34.0% → 38.9%).
